title: Telegram OSINT Scraper → Make.com
description: Scrapes public Telegram channels for the last N hours and sends results to Make.com for AI analysis, report generation and Telegram/Google Drive delivery.

channels.title: Telegram Channels
channels.description: Public Telegram channels to monitor. Accepts: 'channelname', '@channelname', 'https://t.me/channelname'

hoursBack.title: Hours Back
hoursBack.description: Monitoring window in hours (24 = last day)

maxPosts.title: Max Posts Per Channel
maxPosts.description: Maximum posts to collect per channel

makeWebhookUrl.title: Make.com Webhook URL
makeWebhookUrl.description: Custom Webhook URL from Make.com scenario. Get it from: Make → your scenario → Custom Webhook module → copy URL

makeWebhookSecret.title: Webhook Secret (optional)
makeWebhookSecret.description: Optional shared secret sent as X-Webhook-Secret header. Set the same value in your Make.com webhook to verify requests.

maxPostsPerWebhook.title: Posts Per Webhook Batch
maxPostsPerWebhook.description: Split posts into batches of this size. Make.com has ~5MB payload limit per trigger. Recommended: 100
